zh.Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland: 英國蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾希頓
zh.Neville's Cross, Durham, England: 英國達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Menteith於大約1321年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪時，她的父親Sir John de Menteith the Younger30歲，母親Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar31歲。她於1342年之前與Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1387年在英國蘇格蘭澤爾吉爾可爾希頓享年67歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾希頓
zh-hans.Neville's Cross, Durham, England: 英国達勒姆內維爾也斯 克羅斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Menteith于大约1321年出生在英国苏格兰阿爾迪时，她的父亲Sir John de Menteith the Younger30岁，母亲Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar31岁。她于1342年之前与Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1387年在英国苏格兰澤爾吉爾可爾希頓享年67岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Menteith was born about 1321, in Aberdeen, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Menteith the Younger, was 30 and her mother, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, was 31. She married Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain before 1342. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1387, in Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Menteith est née environ 1321, à Aberdeen, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Menteith the Younger, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain avant 1342. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1387, à Synton, Selkirkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Menteith um 1321 in Aberdeen, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Menteith the Younger 30 und ihre Mutter Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar 31. Sie hat vor 1342 Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1387 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Synton, Selkirkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Menteith è nata il circa 1321 nel Aberdeen, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Menteith the Younger, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain prima del 1342. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1387, nel Synton, Selkirkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland: イギリススコットランドセルキルクシュアイアシントン
ja.Perth, Perthshire, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイアペルス
ja.Mar, Aberdeen, Scotland: イギリススコットランドアバーディーン
ja.Neville's Cross, Durham, England: イギリスダルハムネヴィレ'ス クロス
ja.Perthshire, Scotland: スコットランドペルスシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Christian Menteithが約1321年にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Menteith the Youngerは30歳，母Helen-nic-Gartnait of Marは31歳であった。1342年以前にSir John Erskine High Chamberlainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1387年にイギリススコットランドセルキルクシュアイアシントンで67歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Menteith(이)가 대략 1321년 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Menteith the Younger(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1342년 이전 Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1387년 영국 스코틀랜드 셀커크실르 시턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

mn.Synton, Selkirkshire, Scotland: Synton, Siorrachd Shalcraig, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Menteith nasceu aproximadamente 1321, em Aberdeen, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John de Menteith the Younger, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain antes 1342. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1387, em Synton, Selkirkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Menteith родилась около 1321 г. в местности абирдин, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Menteith the Younger было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain перед 1342 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1387 г. в местности синтон, селкиркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Menteith nació aproximadamente 1321, en Aberdeen, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Menteith the Younger, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Sir John Erskine High Chamberlain antes de 1342. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1387, en Synton, Selkirkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
